title: helichrysum italicum subsp. siculum
intro: Helichrysum italicum subsp. siculum, also known as Immortelle, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids, terpenoids, and essential oils, particularly sesquiterpene lactones, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation and pain, and improve skin health due to its high antioxidant capacity and ability to stimulate collagen production. Helichrysum italicum subsp. siculum can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, essential oils, and topical creams, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
